name: SeaTable API
description: SeaTable is an online database and spreadsheet platform. The API provides comprehensive access to bases, tables, rows, columns, views, links, files, and more. Authentication uses tokens with different scopes: Account-Token for account-level operations, API-Token for base access, and Base-Token for base-specific requests.
